title: Technology Startups & SaaS Enterprise
shortDescription: Financial architecture, DPIIT recognition, valuation, ESOP structuring, and FDI compliance for tech and software ventures.
fullDescription: Technology startups and SaaS entities operate in high-growth, capital-intensive environments with unique financial models—including recurring revenue (MRR/ARR), ESOP equity pools, cross-border SaaS sales, Section 56(2)(viib) valuation requirements, and FEMA compliance for foreign direct investment. Anil Puneet and Associates delivers strategic tax, valuation, and compliance services tailored for software and technology founders.
keyChallenges: Navigating Section 56(2)(viib) (Angel Tax) valuations and DPIIT 80-IAC tax exemption applications
FEMA and RBI regulatory compliance for cross-border investments and inward FDI remittances
Designing tax-efficient ESOP schemes for key talent attraction and retention
Accounting for deferred revenue, software R&D capitalization, and cross-border SaaS tax withholding
tailoredSolutions: Formulating DCF and Rule 11UA valuation reports certified by Practicing CA
End-to-end management of Form FC-GPR filing via RBI's FIRMS portal for share allotments
ESOP scheme policy drafting, grant schedules, and tax withholding calculation frameworks
Monthly SaaS revenue recognition models (Ind AS 115) and MIS reporting dashboards

caseStudy.title: Series-A Valuation & FDI Compliance for B2B SaaS Enterprise
caseStudy.context: A seed-funded enterprise software startup secured a $2M investment commitment from an overseas fund requiring valuation certification, FEMA compliance, and cap table restructuring.
caseStudy.approach: Anil Puneet and Associates executed a Discounted Cash Flow valuation under Rule 11UA and FEMA guidelines, prepared FC-GPR documentation, and structured CCPS conversion terms.
caseStudy.outcome: Achieved successful RBI FC-GPR filing approval within statutory timeframes and secured complete Section 56(2)(viib) angel tax compliance clearance.
